matchedHints.itemText: Se debe tener en cuenta que el cambio no es retroactivo, y el mismo comenzará a registrar información de las nuevas Altas/Modificaciones que surjan a partir de la implementación del cambio. Las solicitudes ya abiertas que no hayan finalizado no registrará dicha información.
matchedHints.matchedText: Se debe tener en cuenta que el cambio no es retroactivo, y el mismo comenzará a registrar información de las nuevas Altas/Modificaciones que surjan a partir de la implementación del cambio. Las solicitudes ya abiertas que no hayan finalizado no registrará dicha información.

matchedHints.itemText: The system will have a new feature toggle available to activate this functionality at Configuration level.
matchedHints.matchedText: The system will have a new feature toggle available to activate this functionality at Configuration level.

matchedHints.itemText: This change will not impact previous sent invoices
matchedHints.matchedText: This change will not impact previous sent invoices

matchedHints.itemText: The system will show a new field "Comments" at header level in the "Invoice details" pane.
matchedHints.matchedText: The system will show a new field "Comments" at header level in the "Invoice details" pane.

matchedHints.itemText: The new Comments field will be optional.
matchedHints.matchedText: The new Comments field will be optional.

matchedHints.itemText: In case the Comments field is empty, the system will suggest a standard comment to be specified by the customer.
matchedHints.matchedText: In case the Comments field is empty, the system will suggest a standard comment to be specified by the customer.

matchedHints.itemText: When posting the document, the system will send this new value in the outgoing XML file.
matchedHints.matchedText: When posting the document, the system will send this new value in the outgoing XML file.

result.text: Se debe tener en cuenta que el cambio no es retroactivo, y el mismo comenzará a registrar información de las nuevas Altas/Modificaciones que surjan a partir de la implementación del cambio. Las solicitudes ya abiertas que no hayan finalizado no registrará dicha información.
The system will have a new feature toggle available to activate this functionality at Configuration level.
This change will not impact previous sent invoices
The system will show a new field "Comments" at header level in the "Invoice details" pane.
The new Comments field will be optional.
In case the Comments field is empty, the system will suggest a standard comment to be specified by the customer.
When posting the document, the system will send this new value in the outgoing XML file.
